reply: Risk analysis complete. Returned 6 items (including normalized user entries and suggested risks).

risks.risk: Scope ambiguity may cause rework or scope creep
risks.suggestedMitigation: Clarify scope inclusions/exclusions and get sign-off

risks.risk: Unclear security/privacy requirements could block go-live
risks.suggestedMitigation: Document data flows, access controls, and privacy requirements early
risks.suggestedContingency: Phase release or restrict features until controls are approved

risks.risk: Budget and resourcing uncertainty may delay delivery
risks.suggestedMitigation: Estimate costs and staffing; confirm funding/availability
risks.suggestedContingency: Reduce scope or extend timeline based on capacity

risks.risk: Dependency slippage may impact the critical path
risks.suggestedMitigation: Track dependencies with owners and dates
risks.suggestedContingency: De-scope non-critical items to protect launch date

risks.risk: Stakeholder availability may delay decisions and approvals
risks.suggestedMitigation: Schedule recurring decision checkpoints; assign alternates
risks.suggestedContingency: Escalate to sponsor if decisions stall

risks.suggestedMitigation: Engage security early and pre-book reviews
risks.suggestedContingency: Use phased rollout or temporary controls
